initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Jersey Shore
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in the Jersey Shore area. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: AP Transformative Justice
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through transformative justice practices in Asbury Park. They coordinate direct support initiatives, community healing programs, and solidarity networks while building power through non-carceral approaches to safety, community organizing, and creating spaces for restorative practices.

initiatives.name: Help Not Handcuffs
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through advocacy for harm reduction and alternatives to criminalization in Asbury Park. They coordinate direct support initiatives, policy advocacy, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for healing-centered approaches to public health and safety.
